result.title: The Art of K-Pop Dance #GoogleDoodle
result.description: In celebration of Asian American, Native Hawaiian, and Pacific Islander Heritage Month, this Doodle celebrates the art of K-Pop dance by shining a light on the American K-Pop dance community—where global fandoms connect through local artistry. The Doodle is set to @LESSERAFIM_official's song “Celebration” with choreography interpreted by LA-based K-Pop dance team @SHEROFFICIALS.

result.title: Looking to make a big splash with your photography?
result.description:
It’s easy to begin your underwater photography journey. Learn the basics and dive in deeper with AI Mode in Search.

P.S. Make sure your phone is waterproof before taking the plunge!

result.title: Happy Teacher Appreciation Day #GoogleDoodle
result.description: To the ones who don’t just give answers but also teach us to ask the right questions. Happy Teacher Appreciation Day 🍎 #GoogleDoodle
